_comment: Runtime tuning for the free-space meteorite field. Edited by hand; loaded by src/gameplay/Meteorites.ts at boot.
_touchDamageNotes: Bumped 3-4x from the earlier values: maxHp on most builds is 100, so rocky (35) is 3 hits to kill, iron (65) is ~2 hits, magma (80) can one-shot a damaged hull. Flying through the belt is now a real hazard — mirrors the 'dying loses a ship-part' penalty the player asked for.

spawnRules._comment: spawnDistance 440: meteorites pop in from far away so they're visible on approach rather than materialising in the player's lap. despawnDistance 600: matching cushion behind the ship before recycle. clusterChance 0.15 + clusterSize 2–4: occasional small clumps, mostly singletons — the 'scatter' feel the player asked for rather than tight belts.

weightings._comment: Probability that a fresh spawn is of each type. Normalized at runtime.
